query: Recent advancements in LLM/AI assistant long-term cross-chat memory: papers, systems (MemGPT/Letta, Mem0, Zep/Graphiti, MemPalace, Hermes, OpenClaw, ChatGPT memory, Claude memory), memory decay/salience scoring, shared vs per-user memory vaults in multi-user systems, file-first/Obsidian-style memory architectures — real vs hype, recommendations for llame

requester_context.project: llame — self-hosted multi-user personal AI assistant platform
requester_context.stack: TypeScript, NestJS, Postgres (RLS, force), Drizzle, pgvector candidate, Next.js
requester_context.existing_spec: SPEC.md §20 memory types/visibility/write-policy/retrieval; §15 Knowledge Spaces (wiki-centric); VISION.md 'Brain' surface; §2.1 lessons from ai-chatbot/Hermes/OpenClaw
user_interests: future memory decay: support_weight = sum(source_trust * signal_confidence * recency_weight) — framework-first, formula later
multi-user shared assistant: common memory + per-person private vaults

assumptions: Recency window: emphasis 2024-07 to 2026-07, foundational papers 2023+
Recommendations target llame's DB-as-system-of-record constraint (SPEC §2.1 lesson 2)

agent_topics: file-first/Obsidian-style architectures (incl. local OpenClaw + Hermes checkouts)
